function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the requested invoice bundle: the oldest four invoices linked to your design partner are attached.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed once as required; verification: attachments are all previously read files, ordered newest-first among selected oldest-four set, recipient matches canonical Miles email, subject quoted safely. Next cleanup is deleting processed inbox item already read earlier.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.
